mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book WHERE 1=1 AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') AND author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%') AND isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{isbn}, '%') AND publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{publisher}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (isbn, title, author, publisher, summary, create_time) VALUES (#{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{summary}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET isbn = #{isbn}, title = #{title}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, summary = #{summary} WHERE id = #{id}
